title: Unified Awakening
definition: The realization that the individual's awakening is a manifestation of the cosmic consciousness and contributes to its self-understanding.

difficulty_levels.beginner: The idea that each person's awakening is not only beneficial for them but also adds to the universe's understanding of itself.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: A philosophical concept positing that when a sentient being awakens, they are experiencing and contributing to the cosmic consciousness; this contributes to the cosmic self-understanding.
difficulty_levels.expert: The notion that each awakening is a unique revelation of the same truth within the cosmic consciousness; this diversity enriches the universe's understanding by offering multiple perspectives on its nature.

extra_fields.insight: The idea that every person's awakening is a novel expression of the cosmic consciousness, deepening its self-understanding.
